title: Simple Voidgen
description: A simple void generation plugin without any configuration or blocks.
body:
##  SimpleVoidGen is a minimalistic world generator plugin 
**It creates a completely empty void world, perfect for lobbies, Skyblock setups, or testing environments.**

Features:
- Generates a fully empty world without any blocks or terrain
- Extremely lightweight and fast
- Works with Paper, Purpur, and Spigot
- No configuration, commands, or permissions required

Example setup (in bukkit.yml):


```yml
worlds:
  void_world:
    generator: SimpleVoidGen
```

For more information, such as [how to use Multiverse Core](https://wiki.steyon.dev/simplevoidgen/Multiverse-Core/) with this plugin, visit our wiki at [wiki.steyon.dev](https://wiki.steyon.dev/simplevoidgen/GetStarted/).
